headline: NanoImaging Services Appoints Fraser McLeod as Chief Executive Officer  to Lead Next Phase of Growth
summary: Fraser McLeod CEO, NanoImaging Services San Diego, CA, March 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- NanoImaging Services (NIS), a leading provider of integrated gene-to-structure and cryo-electron microscopy (cryo-EM) services for structure-based drug discovery, is pleased to announce the appointment of Fraser McLeod as Chief Executive Officer.
